== Notes for [[Item:Q52432|Q52432]] ==

{geni:about_me} ACCORDING TO BUDDHIST LEGENDS, HE WENT TO TAPOVANA TO BE A RENUNCIANT BUT AFTER A PUBLIC OUTCRY RETURNED AND RULED FOR SOME TIME.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D5176CF1EFBBFC9A22EF79916B22EF

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
